description_long: This is a compact, rectangular wallet crafted from rich brown leather, featuring a smooth central panel bordered by a basket-weave textured trim. The stitching along the edges is prominent and precise, adding both durability and a decorative touch. The wallet appears to be bifold, as indicated by the narrow side views that reveal a central opening for inserting cards or cash. The leather surface has a subtle sheen and displays natural grain patterns, with a slight gloss that enhances its premium appearance. No visible logos or branding are present, and the wallet is free from any visible attachments or chains. The overall design is classic and understated, suitable for everyday use in urban environments.
description: A brown leather bifold wallet with a smooth center and basket-weave textured trim, featuring prominent stitching and a subtle sheen.
description_view_0: Front view showing the smooth leather panel bordered by basket-weave textured trim and visible stitching.
description_view_1: Side view revealing the narrow profile and central opening, indicating a bifold design.
description_view_2: Back view similar to the front, with smooth leather and basket-weave trim, but with slightly different leather grain patterns.
description_view_3: Opposite side view, again showing the slim profile and central opening of the bifold wallet.
attribute_decorative_pattern: basket-weave textured trim around the edges; smooth leather center panel
